title: Onboarding - What's new screen - Updating from previous app version
scenario: When updating from a pre-5.0.0.X version to the latest, the "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen appears on launch and tapping "Get Started" dismisses it to the Home Screen.
steps: 1. Launch the app after updating from a previous version (before 5.0.0.X) to the latest version.
2. Observe the screen that appears right after launch.
4. Observe the screen that appears after tapping.
expected: The "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen should appear right after launch. Tapping "Get Started" dismisses the screen and brings the user to the Home Screen.
